name: To InfiniBand and beyond, cry firms
description: Computerworld Australia feature on InfiniBand, a next-generation data-center interconnect operating at 2.5-10 Gbps (scaling to 30 Gbps) backed by 150+ firms in the InfiniBand Trade Association including IBM, Intel, Microsoft, Sun, and Dell. Draws on Aberdeen Group's 'InfiniBand Architecture: Planning the Next Generation Data Centre' white paper. Kastner (Aberdeen EVP/CRO) predicts InfiniBand 'will replace TCP/IP as the high-speed, server-to-server interconnect technology' with ISPs, ASPs and large web sites as initial targets.
